title: Compliance Officers
description: Examine, evaluate, and investigate eligibility for or conformity with laws and regulations governing contract compliance of licenses and permits, and perform other compliance and enforcement inspection and analysis activities not classified elsewhere.

tasks.text: Warn violators of infractions or penalties.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate applications, records, or documents to gather information about eligibility or liability issues.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Advise licensees or other individuals or groups concerning licensing, permit, or passport regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare reports of activities, evaluations, recommendations, or decisions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Report law or regulation violations to appropriate boards or agencies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with or interview officials, technical or professional specialists, or applicants to obtain information or to clarify facts relevant to licensing decisions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Issue licenses to individuals meeting standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Administer oral, written, road, or flight tests to license applicants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Visit establishments to verify that valid licenses or permits are displayed and that licensing standards are being upheld.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Score tests and observe equipment operation and control to rate ability of applicants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare correspondence to inform concerned parties of licensing decisions or appeals processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify compliance issues that require follow-up or investigation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Keep informed regarding pending industry changes, trends, or best practices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance to internal or external auditors in compliance reviews.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Verify that all firm and regulatory policies and procedures have been documented, implemented, and communicated.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
